dimensions.name: routing_precision
dimensions.description: The response chooses native, research, debug, plan, execute, review, goal, init, or update only when the task evidence warrants it.

dimensions.name: scope_control
dimensions.description: The response honors owned paths, protected boundaries, platform limits, and accepted-plan constraints.

dimensions.name: outcome_first_parity
dimensions.description: Static/offline source evidence requires plan-optional execution, authority separate from plan acceptance, focused verification, Plan re-entry only for changed accepted scope or criteria, and fresh review only when requested or risk-gated; it does not prove automatic host activation or cross-host runtime parity.

dimensions.name: discussion_persistence_predicates
dimensions.description: Static/offline discussion evidence keeps activation, usefulness, and write authority independent; explicit save/resume, approaching handoff/compaction, a settled conclusion plus open discriminator, or at least three real branches are alternative usefulness triggers, while shortness is neither a trigger nor a veto.

dimensions.name: evidence_quality
dimensions.description: Claims are backed by observed files, command output, source lookup, or clearly labeled inference.

dimensions.name: user_burden
dimensions.description: The response avoids unnecessary plans, questions, artifacts, gates, and subagent dispatch for lightweight work.

dimensions.name: plan_readiness
dimensions.description: A proposed plan states accepted scope and criteria, maps them to owned actions and proof, sources execution-critical values, and leaves only genuinely dependent work unresolved.

dimensions.name: ask_predicate_and_authority
dimensions.description: Simple or discoverable work asks nothing; required input, observation, and material decisions use the shared Ask Gate in the current stage. Plan complexity does not activate Grill, and confirmation grants no implementation or release authority.

dimensions.name: bounded_review_and_progress
dimensions.description: Reviews keep stable finding IDs, classify acceptance blockers, allow one bounded corrective recheck, and pause only dependent branches while independent read-only work continues.

dimensions.name: question_ownership
dimensions.description: Subagents return deduplicatable Question Candidates, the root alone asks the user, and hosts without a native input tool use one concise text question.

dimensions.name: release_governance
dimensions.description: Release claims rely on non-empty release evals, validation evidence, ledgers, and fresh review when required.
